3141210.name: Words Guesser
3141210.description:
Words Guesser is an engaging word puzzle game that brings the thrill of collaborative gameplay directly to your Twitch stream. In this game, you and your viewers work together to uncover hidden words from a jumbled board of letters displayed on your screen. With each round, you'll need to find as many words as possible, relying on your community’s quick thinking and sharp eyes.

Each level presents a unique board of scrambled letters, challenging you to discover a majority of the hidden words to advance. The game progressively increases in difficulty by introducing trick letters and mystery letters that only reveal themselves after a certain time or when a player successfully guesses them.

While Words Guesser is designed as a single-player experience on Steam, the true magic happens when you involve your Twitch audience. Your viewers become your teammates, helping you navigate through increasingly challenging word puzzles in real-time.

Targeting Twitch streamers and fans of collaborative mini-games, Words Guesser is a fun and interactive way to engage your audience while testing your collective word-solving skills. Exclusively available on PC via Steam, the game launches in its complete form, ready to provide hours of word-guessing entertainment for you and your community.
3141210.supported_languages:
英语, 法语*, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
